name: Minor Illusion
img: is static unless you use action to move it. Physical interaction reveals illusory effect.

description.value: Create a sound or image at close range no larger than a 5ft cube. Sound can be any noise. Image is static unless you use action to move it. Physical interaction reveals illusory effect.

system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
